ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vessels" (
  "vessel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vessel */,
  "boat_name" TEXT /* Name of the vessel */,
  "hull_id" TEXT /* Hull ID of the vessel */,
  "hailing_port" TEXT /* Hailing port of the vessel */,
  "vessel_type" TEXT /* Type of vessel (e.g., Recreational, Commercial) */,
  "gross_tons" REAL /* Gross tons of the vessel */,
  "length" REAL /* Length of the vessel in feet */,
  "builder_id" INTEGER /* ID of the builder of the vessel */,
  "build_year" INTEGER /* Year the vessel was built */,
  "registration_status" TEXT /* Current registration status (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  "next_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the next inspection */,
  "engine_type" TEXT /* Type of engine (e.g., Diesel, Gasoline) */,
  "engine_power" REAL /* Power of the engine in horsepower */,
  "beam" REAL /* Width of the vessel */,
  "draft" REAL /* Depth of the vessel below the waterline */,
  "vessel_class" TEXT /* Class of the vessel (e.g., Class A, Class B) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vessel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vessels_builder_id FOREIGN KEY ("builder_id") REFERENCES builders ("builder_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "registrations" (
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each registration */,
  "vessel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vessel being registered */,
  "registered_to" TEXT /* Name of the person or organization the vessel is registered to */,
  "registered_address" TEXT /* Address of the person or organization the vessel is registered to */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the vessel was registered */,
  "registration_number" TEXT /* Unique registration number */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Date when the registration expires */,
  "issued_by" TEXT /* Name of the authority that issued the registration */,
  "registration_type" TEXT /* Type of registration (e.g., Temporary, Permanent) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("registration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registrations_vessel_id FOREIGN KEY ("vessel_id") REFERENCES vessels ("vessel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "builders" (
  "builder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each builder */,
  "builder_name" TEXT /* Name of the vessel builder */,
  "build_year" INTEGER /* Year the vessel was built */,
  "builder_address" TEXT /* Address of the builder */,
  "builder_contact" TEXT /* Contact information of the builder */,
  "builder_website" TEXT /* Website of the builder */,
  "builder_country" TEXT /* Country of the builder */,
  "builder_established_year" INTEGER /* Year the builder was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("builder_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ownership_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ownership history entry */,
  "vessel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vessel */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the owner */,
  "ownership_date" TEXT /* Date the vessel was owned by the specified owner */,
  "transfer_date" TEXT /* Date when ownership was transferred */,
  "previous_owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the previous owner */,
  "transfer_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the transfer (e.g., Sale, Gift) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ownership_history_vessel_id FOREIGN KEY ("vessel_id") REFERENCES vessels ("vessel_id")
)
column_names: Length of the vessel in feet
ID of the builder of the vessel
Power of the engine in horsepower
Depth of the vessel below the waterline
Class of the vessel (e.g., Class A, Class B)
ID of the vessel being registered
Name of the person or organization the vessel is registered to
Address of the person or organization the vessel is registered to
Name of the authority that issued the registration
Unique identifier for each ownership history entry
Date the vessel was owned by the specified owner
Reason for the transfer (e.g., Sale, Gift)
